product: History sharing now enabled by default to improve table read performance for…
tagline: History sharing is enabled by default (for Databricks Runtime 16.2 and above) to improve table read performance for Databricks to Databricks Delta Sharing.
what_it_does: History sharing is enabled by default (for Databricks Runtime 16.2 and above) to improve table read performance for Databricks to Databricks Delta Sharing. This page gives an overview of how to use Databricks to Databricks OpenSharing to share data securely with any Databricks user, regardless of account or cloud host, as long as that user has access to a workspace enabled for Unity Catalog. Who should use Databricks to Databricks OpenSharing?
why_it_matters: History sharing is enabled by default (for Databricks Runtime 16.2 and above) to improve table read performance for Databricks to Databricks Delta Sharing.
plain_summary: History sharing is enabled by default (for Databricks Runtime 16.2 and above) to improve table read performance for Databricks to Databricks Delta Sharing. This page gives an overview of how to use Databricks to Databricks OpenSharing to share data securely…

capabilities.title: A commercial cloud shares to
capabilities.desc: A commercial cloud shares to or receives shares from either AWS GovCloud or AWS GovCloud DoD.

capabilities.title: AWS GovCloud and AWS GovCloud
capabilities.desc: AWS GovCloud and AWS GovCloud DoD share with each other.
